title: Accurate Tools Overhaul
description: Make the tools in Minecraft more accurate to real-life or in-game recipe
body:
Tools in Minecraft are rather boring and not so accurate.

Accurate Tools Overhaul changes that. It makes tools more accurate to real-life or in-game recipes. Download the resource pack and explore.

You can showcase this pack in any of your videos.
If you have any other questions about the resource pack, leave them in my Github issue tracker so I can see them.

**Note: You can safely ignore the incompatible error message. And it should be working for all versions that have these tools and weapons.**

See the tools' texture in the Gallery tab.

- Wood: It's wood, it's very old and easy to break. (It's also not easy to make a good shape)
- Stone: A very hard material so you can't craft a very good shape.
- Iron: Iron is not pure white, with a little bit of dirt around it.
- Gold: Is it because the tools are so short, they have low durability?
- Diamond: Very shiny material, isn't it?
- Netherite: Isn't it weird you need gold to craft a netherite ingot? It should have gold on the tools!
